mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_users
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_users (username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, avatar_url, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admin_users SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admin_users SET last_login = #{lastLogin}, last_ip = #{lastIp} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM admin_users WHERE id IN
#{id}
